title: App Settings - General - About - Up to date, release notes
scenario: Verify that the "Release Notes" link in the About section opens the correct Lens version web page as specified in the Figma design.
steps: Observe the web page that opens
expected: The 'Release Notes' link opens the URL https://info.lens.poly.com/lens-mobile-rn, which displays the correct Lens version web page as specified in the Figma design.
